race.comment: OPTIONS (1) has been plying his trade in much harder Group and Listed races and should find this assingment a touch easier. Gets some well-needed weight relief with the 1.5kg claim and will be ready to peak now third-up from the break. Capable of sharp improvement. TOBY'S TRUSTY (8) is one from one at this circuit and maps nicely for this from gate two. Good enough to play a major role in the outcome. NORTY FORTY (10) got a confidence building win last time out and is ready for the step-up in trip now. Top-three aspirations. CHILLIES (2) drops back heavily in trip but should be hitting the line with gusto. SIMPLY GOLD (12) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
